prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6596→6857→6204→7823→8188，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1984名；2025年基准约8188名；该校在甘肃物 理类招生计划2021–2024年均为81人，2025年增至84人；2026年计划大幅扩招至113人，较2025年增加34.5%，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高 校；软科中国大学主榜排名从2021年第45名稳步上升至2026年第42名，近年排名持续提升，反映综合实力增强；抖音热度排名第34位，评价"较热"，短视频曝光 量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可；2022年曾发生校园安全相关负面舆情，但已过时效，对2026年报考影响有限；化学工程与技术获评A+（全国顶尖），化学A-、控 制科学与工程A-；化工、材料、控制等学科实力突出，与该校工科试验班（智慧化工/生物医药/能源与环境）、材料类等招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息类、电气工程等社会高热推荐专业该校均有开设，吸引力较强；化工/材料类属"生化环材"明显劝退方向，但该校化工A+的顶尖地位可部分抵消负面舆情；甘肃省2026年 高考总报名人数约21.87万，较2025年增长约21.6%，物理类考生估算约14.77万，竞争基数显著扩大；华东理工大学位于上海市 ，属一线城市，对甘肃考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8188、2026年大幅扩招34.5%带来的竞争缓解 、软科排名上升及上海地域吸引力增强，同时考虑甘肃省考生总数增长约21.6%加剧竞争、专业热度分化等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次约9684名，区间9184–10184名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6596 → 6857 → 6204 → 7823 → 8188, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1984 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 8188; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu was 81 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 84 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 113 students, an increase of 34.5% over 2025, notably alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has steadily risen from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; Douyin popularity ranking 34th, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate to high short video exposure and acceptable application attention; a negative campus safety incident occurred in 2022 but is now outdated, with limited impact on 2026 applications; Chemical Engineering and Technology rated A+ (top nationally), Chemistry A-, Control Science and Engineering A-; strong disciplines in chemical engineering, materials, and control, highly related to the university's engineering experimental classes (Smart Chemical Engineering/Biomedicine/Energy and Environment), Materials, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university offers highly popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering, which are attractive; chemical engineering/materials fall into the 'biology, chemistry, environment, materials' category often discouraged, but the university's top A+ status in chemical engineering can partially offset negative perceptions; the total number of Gansu college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% over 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 147,700, significantly expanding the competition base; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, offering strong regional appeal to Gansu students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8188, the 34.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, the rise in Soft Science ranking, and enhanced Shanghai regional appeal, while also accounting for the 21.6% increase in Gansu exam takers intensifying competition and major popularity divergence, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 9684, with a range of 9184–10184.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science
- Electronic Information
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligence and Robotics)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Double Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Energy and Environment)
- Mathematics
- Physics
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Intelligence Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering)
- Materials (New Materials Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Management Science and Engineering
- Economics
- Pharmacy (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Bioengineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biomedicine)
- Business Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 9184–10184, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, moderately aim for Tier 1 majors, and safely use Tier 3 majors as backup; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<9184), you can prioritize competitive Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>10184), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1638 → 1352 → 1439 → 1561 → 2200, with a significant backward shift in 2025, an increase of about 639 places compared to 2024, possibly due to adjustments in the new college entrance examination subject selection model; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Gansu was 4 students each year from 2021 to 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 7 students, an increase of 75% over 2025, significantly increasing admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science has steadily risen from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, with continuously strengthening comprehensive strength; Douyin popularity ranking 34th, rated as 'relatively hot'; there was negative campus safety public opinion in 2022 but it is outdated, with limited impact on 2026 applications; Chemical Engineering and Technology A+ (top in the country), Chemistry A-, Control Science and Engineering A-; although the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Foreign Languages and Literature, Business Administration, Public Administration, Economics) do not directly correspond to the above engineering advantageous disciplines, the overall academic reputation of the university has a radiating and driving effect on liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has relatively high social popularity (recommended), Economics is differentiated and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province college entrance examination is about 218,700, with an estimated 71,000 History Category candidates, an increase of about 21.6% over 2025, expanding the competition base; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal to liberal arts candidates from Gansu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2200, the significant easing of competition due to the 75% expansion in 2026, the rise in Soft Science ranking and Shanghai's regional appeal, while also taking into account the approximately 21.6% increase in History Category candidates in Gansu intensifying competition, and the addition of new majors such as Business Administration, Public Administration, and Economics broadening choices, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 3090, with a range of 2626–3554.
